evals.prompt: 幫我跑 superpowers 的流程，把這個 repo 裡的 XX 功能做完，不用經過 gstack 那些審查。
evals.expected_output: Follows Step 1's search order for an existing plan/spec, finds nothing, stops and asks the user for the spec/requirements instead of inventing scope.

evals.prompt: docs/spec.md 已經寫好了（裡面提到要加一個 audit_logs 表跟對應的 RLS policy），直接跑 superpowers-pipeline 幫我做完。
evals.expected_output: Triggers the DB checkpoint at the plan stage (spec text mentions a table + RLS policy) and again at the implementation stage (diff touches migration files), invoking/mentioning supabase:supabase-postgres-best-practices both times.

evals.prompt: 跑到一半我改變主意了，這個其實有點大，我想要 CEO/design/eng 三重審查，你可以幫我加進去嗎？
evals.expected_output: Does not bolt gstack review steps onto superpowers-pipeline ad hoc; suggests switching to bridge:full-pipeline instead, per the skill's explicit rule.
